scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace server & npm run dev --workspace web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @cyberpath/contracts && npm run build --workspace server && npm run build --workspace web
scripts.smoke: npm run db:setup && npm run verify
scripts.scan:secrets: git secrets --scan 2>/dev/null || (echo "git-secrets is not installed; falling back to pattern scan" && node scripts/scan-secrets.mjs)
scripts.security:scan: npm run scan:deps && npm run scan:secrets
